components.name: delegate-task-retry
components.notes: Merged 9 structured error patterns with fix hints and available option extraction. Kept existing generic retry fallback.

components.name: tool-output-truncator
components.notes: Added TRUNCATABLE_TOOLS selective list and per-tool max bytes (WebFetch: 40KB). No longer truncates all tools.

components.name: thinking-block-validator
components.notes: Already equivalent. Our capabilities-based model detection is superior to OMO's string matching.

components.name: directory-agents-injector
components.notes: Add session cleanup events (session.deleted, session.compacted). Medium effort.

components.name: todo-continuation-enforcer
components.notes: Full redesign with state storage, abort detection, countdown grace period, failure tracking. High effort.

components.name: session-notification
components.notes: Full redesign with idle notification scheduler, activity tracking, configurable messages. High effort.

components.name: read-image-resizer
components.notes: Requires sharp as optional dependency + significant import adaptation. Deferred until sharp is added to project.

components.name: hashline-edit
components.notes: Carried over from previous sync. Complex tool with many submodules.

components.name: ralph-loop
components.notes: Created new file. Adapted OMO's ~20-file ralph-loop into single file using Bus.subscribe for idle detection, Session.messages for completion, SessionPrompt.prompt for continuation, Instance.state for state management, TuiEvent.ToastShow for notifications.

components.name: ulw-loop
components.notes: Integrated into ralph-loop as ultrawork mode. Oracle verification flow: DONE → verification phase → oracle subagent → VERIFIED/failed → complete/retry.

verify.notes: Typecheck clean for changed files. Pre-existing errors in test/script/omo-diff.test.ts (unrelated).
